Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Anne T. Acuna of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Irving Juarez, et al.
David M. Glaspy of GLASPY & GLASPY, INC. (925-947-1300) appearing for defendant / opposing party LG E and Ku Capital LLC

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS IRVING JUAREZ, ET AL.'S MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT LG E AND KU CAPITAL LLC TO PRODUCE CUSTODIAN(S) OF RECORDS AND PERSON(S) MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, AND PLAINTIFFS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to compel LG&E and Ku Capital LLC to produce custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents and request for sanctions of $1061.00 is granted. No opposition filed. The Court ordered the deposition to be completed by October 1, 2012. Counsel for plaintiffs to prepare an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs and Petitioners' motion to realign defendant-heir as plaintiff and to correct clerical error in plaintiff's name is granted.
